summary: Backend testing for APPROVED_PRO signup verification queue bug fix completed. 8/8 tests passed. The fix correctly changes 'request_type' to 'verification_type' in auth.py, ensuring VerificationRequests are created with the correct field name that matches the admin_p1.py queue endpoint expectations.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py line 277: Correctly uses verification_type='approved_pro_photographer' (was previously request_type which didn't match model)
auth.py line 279: additional_notes includes signup info (full_name, username, company) for admin review
auth.py lines 103-116: Username validation properly enforces 3-30 chars, alphanumeric + underscores only
admin_p1.py line 206: Queue endpoint correctly filters by verification_type field
seed_data_creation: Test users created with @test.rawsurf.io emails for verification queue testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: APPROVED_PRO signup verification queue bug is fixed. When a user signs up with role=APPROVED_PRO, a VerificationRequest is auto-created with verification_type='approved_pro_photographer' and appears in the admin queue at GET /api/admin/verification/queue. Username is now required during signup with validation (3-30 chars, alphanumeric + underscores).

features_tested.approved_pro_signup_creates_verification: PASS - POST /api/auth/signup with role=APPROVED_PRO creates VerificationRequest
features_tested.verification_request_in_admin_queue: PASS - GET /api/admin/verification/queue returns pending APPROVED_PRO requests
features_tested.username_char_validation: PASS - Invalid chars (hyphens, special chars) returns 400

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Admin Verification Queue not showing new Approved Pro signups. User 'AtlantisSurf' signed up as Approved Pro but was not appearing in the admin review queue.
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: auth.py was using 'request_type' field instead of 'verification_type' when creating VerificationRequest, which didn't match the model schema
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: CONFIRMED FIXED - New APPROVED_PRO signups now appear in admin queue
